title: HyperDirector Audio Manifest
description: Declares all audio segments used in a HyperDirector composition. Tracks voice segments, provider metadata, scene bindings, caption references, consent status, and render readiness. See rules/audio-director-rules.md.

project_id.description: Project identifier or title. Should match brief.title.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this manifest was first generated.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this manifest was last updated.

audio_root.description: Relative path to the audio assets directory, from the project output root. Example: 'assets/audio'. All segment local_path values are resolved relative to the project output root, not this field.

caption_timeline_path.description: Optional relative path to the companion caption-timeline.json file. Example: 'caption-timeline.json'.

default_language.description: Default BCP-47 language tag for segments that do not declare their own. Example: 'zh-CN', 'en-US'.

segments.description: Ordered list of voice/audio segments. Order should match timeline position.

segment_id.description: Unique segment identifier within this manifest. Use snake_case or kebab-case. Example: 'seg_scene01_narration', 'seg-02-hook'.

scene_id.description: Storyboard scene ID this segment belongs to. Must match a scene.id in storyboard.json. Example: 'scene_01', 'scene-02'.

shot_id.description: Optional shot ID within the scene. Example: 'scene_01-shot-01'.

speaker_id.description: Optional speaker identifier, used when multiple speakers appear in a project. Free string. Example: 'narrator', 'host_a', 'product_voice'.

voice_profile_id.description: Optional reference to a voice_profile entry (Pro: see pro-templates/audio/voice-profile.schema.json). Enables provider-neutral voice swapping.

text.description: The script text for this segment. This is the source text passed to the TTS provider. Must be non-empty.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag for this segment. Inherits from manifest default_language if absent. Example: 'zh-CN', 'en-US'.

provider.description: TTS provider used (or planned) for this segment. Free string for provider neutrality. Examples: 'edge-tts', 'cosyvoice', 'chattts', 'fish_audio', 'minimax', 'manual_recording'. Leave empty if not yet determined.

voice_name.description: Provider-specific voice name or ID. Example: 'zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural' for edge-tts. Leave empty if not yet determined.

local_path.description: Relative path to the local audio file, from the project output root. Required when render_safe = true. Example: 'assets/audio/scene01_narration.mp3'.

format.description: Audio file format. Preferred: mp3, m4a/aac. See R-AUD-05.

duration_ms.description: Audio segment duration in milliseconds. Used for sync validation against scene duration (R-AUD-07). Populate from actual audio file metadata when available.

start_ms.description: Absolute start position in the video timeline, in milliseconds. 0 = video start.

end_ms.description: Absolute end position in the video timeline, in milliseconds. Should equal start_ms + duration_ms.

transcript.description: Actual spoken content as rendered by the TTS provider (post-synthesis). May differ from text due to provider normalisation. Used for caption alignment validation (R-AUD-08).

caption_ref.description: Reference to the corresponding caption_id in caption-timeline.json. Enables cross-document sync validation.

render_safe.description: Whether this segment is cleared for production render. Must be true for all segments in final render (R-AUD-02). Conditions: local_path exists, format approved, consent_status confirmed, no API keys in manifest, transcript populated.

consent_status.description: Voice consent and cloning status for this segment. See R-AUD-03 for full semantics. 'not_applicable': no TTS, no cloning. 'tts_only': standard TTS with provider-licensed voice, no personal resemblance. 'consent_obtained': voice cloning/personal voice with written consent on record. 'consent_pending': consent not yet confirmed — blocks render_safe. 'unknown': source unclear — blocks render_safe.

consent_notes.description: Required when consent_status = 'consent_obtained'. Record the consent reference: who authorized, when, and how (e.g. 'Written consent from [name] on 2026-05-12 via email, reference: consent-2026-Q2-001').

provider_metadata.description: Optional provider-specific metadata. Must not contain API keys, tokens, passwords, or credentials. Use for non-sensitive parameters only (e.g. voice style, speed, pitch settings submitted to provider).

notes.description: Free-text notes about this segment. Record production decisions, known issues, or timing adjustments.

segments.text: 你有没有想过，一个人就能做出专业级的产品演示视频？
segments.transcript: 你有没有想过，一个人就能做出专业级的产品演示视频？

segments.text: HyperDirector 让 Hermes 直接从 brief 到渲染好的 MP4，全程 AI 辅助。
segments.transcript: HyperDirector 让 Hermes 直接从 brief 到渲染好的 MP4，全程 AI 辅助。
segments.notes: PENDING: audio file not yet generated
